## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Build or repository maintenance

## Affected Areas

- [ ] Local records / IndexedDB
- [ ] WebDAV backup
- [ ] Cloudflare Worker sync
- [ ] D1 / KV / R2 storage
- [ ] Image attachments
- [ ] PWA / service worker
- [ ] Android / iOS packaging
- [ ] Documentation only

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Other:

## Security Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit real ledger data, secrets, tokens, WebDAV credentials, Cloudflare credentials, invite codes, or local env files.
- [ ] I considered whether this change affects personal finance data, sync isolation, attachment access, backup/restore, or PWA caching.
- [ ] I updated documentation when changing behavior, workflow, deployment, or architecture.
